Name: Gatoway
Author: Gatoway

Actions.Name: Key
Actions.Tooltip: Generic Gatoway key: forwards presses to Gatoway core and displays whatever it instructs, including the idle appearance when no application currently has focus.

Actions.Name: Dial
Actions.Tooltip: Generic Gatoway dial: forwards rotation and presses to Gatoway core and displays whatever it instructs, including the idle appearance when no application currently has focus.

Description: Spawns and supervises Gatoway core, connects to it as an authenticated client, and renders generic Key/Dial actions whose display and behavior Gatoway core controls, including the idle appearance when nothing is focused.
